TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Alan_Anderson, title = Alan_Anderson, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Alan_Anderson} }

S.FORM: == Alan Anderson == siwkay niza Alan Anderson (10 a bulad 16 a demiad, 1982 a mihcan), Alan Anderson, miunduay. u sulit nu Hulam atu Amilika Alan Jeffery Anderson is an American professional basketball who last played for the Los Angeles Clippers of the National Basketball Association (NBA). kakuniza kalunasulitan-sulu
S.PHON: == ar~…æan and…ôrson == siwkaj niza ar~…æan and…ôrson (** a bur~…æad ** a d…ômiad, **** a miƒß ¶an), ar~…æan and…ôrson, miunduaj. u sur~…æit nu ƒßur~…æam atu amir~…æika ar~…æan *…ôff…ôrj and…ôrson is an am…ôri ¶an prof…ôssionar~…æ bask…ôtbar~…ær~…æ wƒßo r~…æast pr~…æaj…ôd for tƒß…ô r~…æos a≈ã…ôr~…æ…ôs ¶r~…æipp…ôrs of tƒß…ô nationar~…æ bask…ôtbar~…ær~…æ asso ¶iation (nba). kakuniza kar~…æunasur~…æitan-sur~…æu
S.FORM: == Alan Anderson == siwkay niza Alan Anderson (10 a bulad 16 a demiad, 1982 a mihcan), Alan Anderson, miunduay. u sulit nu Hulam atu Amilika Alan Jeffery Anderson is an American professional basketball who last played for the Los Angeles Clippers of the National Basketball Association (NBA). kakuniza kalunasulitan-sulu
